# Loader Reference

<!-- This file is generated by scripts/gen-loaders-reference.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

This reference is generated from the `LOADERS` registry in `src/loaders.ts`
(extension → loader) and the `INGEST_BASE_EXTENSIONS` allowlist in
`src/ingest-filter.ts` (which extensions are ingested by default). Run
`npm run docs:gen-loaders` after changing a loader or the default allowlist,
and commit the result. The `docs:check-loaders` gate (part of `npm run check`)
fails if this file drifts.

Columns:

- **Extension** — the lowercased file extension, matched case-insensitively.
- **Loader** — `text (raw UTF-8)` is the default; a named loader means the
  format is decoded to plain text before chunking.
- **Structured?** — `yes` when a dedicated loader replaces the raw-text read.
- **Default-enabled?** — `yes` when the extension is in `INGEST_BASE_EXTENSIONS`
  and ingested without extra configuration. `no` means opt in with
  `INGEST_EXTRA_EXTENSIONS` (e.g. `INGEST_EXTRA_EXTENSIONS=.pdf`).
- **Chunking note** — how the loader shapes text before the splitter runs.

10 extensions have explicit handling (6 with a dedicated loader). Any other plain-text extension opted in via `INGEST_EXTRA_EXTENSIONS` rides the default text loader.

| Extension | Loader | Structured? | Default-enabled? | Chunking note |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `.csv` | delimited-table (comma) | yes | no | Rows grouped into chunk-sized blocks, each repeating the column header. |
| `.htm` | html-to-text | yes | yes | Tags stripped to readable text (links/images dropped); split by the default text splitter. |
| `.html` | html-to-text | yes | yes | Tags stripped to readable text (links/images dropped); split by the default text splitter. |
| `.ipynb` | ipynb | yes | no | One labelled block per notebook cell; split by the default text splitter. |
| `.markdown` | text (raw UTF-8) | no | yes | Read verbatim as UTF-8; split by the default text splitter. |
| `.md` | text (raw UTF-8) | no | yes | Read verbatim as UTF-8; split by the default text splitter. |
| `.pdf` | pdf-parse | yes | no | Extracted text stream; split by the default text splitter. |
| `.rst` | text (raw UTF-8) | no | yes | Read verbatim as UTF-8; split by the default text splitter. |
| `.tsv` | delimited-table (tab) | yes | no | Rows grouped into chunk-sized blocks, each repeating the column header. |
| `.txt` | text (raw UTF-8) | no | yes | Read verbatim as UTF-8; split by the default text splitter. |
